summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of GEO Boost Engine landing page. All major features working correctly including FAQ accordion, sticky elements, smooth scroll, and mobile responsiveness.

ui_bugs.issue: Sticky CTA bar shows as visible at top of page instead of being hidden
Some CTA buttons have overlay interception from sticky header/CTA (requires force clicks)

passed_tests: Hero section renders with headline and CTA buttons
Sticky header functionality works on scroll
Problem section with 3 cards displays correctly
What Is GEO Boost section with AI visibility score preview
How It Works section with 3 steps displays
What You Get section Bento grid layout renders perfectly
Social proof section with 3 testimonial cards
Value stack section with pricing comparison
FAQ accordion expand/collapse functionality works perfectly
Sticky CTA bar appears on scroll
All 7 CTA buttons have proper data-testid attributes
Smooth scroll to How It Works section works
All sections render correctly on mobile
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Adjust sticky CTA visibility logic to hide at top of page. Otherwise, landing page is working excellently with all major features functional.
